race.comment: Open race to close out the card. HIDDEN FUTURE (12) saves her best form for this distance range with a win and a placing from three attempts and will be at peak fitness for this contest. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and expecting a sharp spike in form against this line-up. MONTE CARLO MISS (13) broke the maiden status in impressive fashion last time out and will have taken a lot of confidence from that dominant victory. Another who gets some weight off and shouldn't be discounted lightly. RED CODE (4) is one from one around this circuit and draws favourably with the inside marble. Top-three conveyance. KEEP IT LOKI (7) is knocking on the door of another win with consecutive runner-up finishes. Must be respected. VOSTOKOVA (10) is a last-start winner who can go right on with the job now.
